● The issue: randomize just shuffles the existing tiles array, but it should fill all
  columns × rows slots by sampling with replacement from the available sources.

● Edit TilesWidget.jsx +8 -3
  └ packages/react/src/canvas/widgets/TilesWidget.jsx

● Done. Randomize now fills all columns × rows slots by randomly sampling from the
  available tile sources (with repetition allowed, so every slot gets an image even if
  there are fewer unique tiles than slots).
